Budget briefs · Reports

Short, sharp budget reports you can actually use.

Skip the 200‑page PDFs. Read clear, youth‑friendly briefs that tell you what changed, why it matters, and what to ask next.

Our simplified reports follow a consistent structure for easy understanding

Need a brief for your county or sector?

We can help you understand specific budget areas that matter to you. Request a custom report or join our training program.

We turn national and county budgets into clear insights, practical analysis, and trackable evidence to enhance youth participation and accountability.

Welcome to **BudgetNdioStory Support Desk**! 👋 I'm here to help you with any questions or issues you may have. How can I assist you today? 💡 I use AI trained on public budget documents. Your conversations help us improve but aren't shared with third parties.
